Class TownyPlayerDamagePlayerEvent

java.lang.Object
org.bukkit.event.Event
com.palmergames.bukkit.towny.event.damage.TownyDamageEvent
com.palmergames.bukkit.towny.event.damage.TownyPlayerDamagePlayerEvent
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.bukkit.event.Cancellable
public class TownyPlayerDamagePlayerEvent extends TownyDamageEvent
Part of the API which lets Towny's war and other plugins modify Towny's plot-permission-decision outcomes.
Author:
LlmDl

  • Constructor Details

    • TownyPlayerDamagePlayerEvent

      public TownyPlayerDamagePlayerEvent(org.bukkit.Location location, org.bukkit.entity.Entity harmedEntity, org.bukkit.event.entity.EntityDamageEvent.DamageCause cause, TownBlock townblock, boolean cancelled, org.bukkit.entity.Player attackingPlayer)
      Event thrown when a player damages a player.
      Parameters:
      location - Location of the entity being damaged.
      harmedEntity - Entity getting exploded.
      cause - DamageCause.
      townblock - TownBlock or null if in the wilderness.
      cancelled - Whether Towny will cancel this already.
      attackingPlayer - Player causing the damage to the harmedEntity.

    • getAttackingResident

      @Nullable public @Nullable Resident getAttackingResident()
      Returns:
      Resident object of the attacking player or (unlikely,) null.

    • getVictimResident

      @Nullable public @Nullable Resident getVictimResident()
      Returns:
      Resident object of the victim player or (unlikely,) null.
